issues.title: Conflicting DDL Dialects
issues.why: The module provides both SQLite (PascalCase) and PostgreSQL (snake_case) DDLs. While AC-ADB-11 designates SQLite as primary, having two distinct schemas in one file increases the risk of a mediocre coder picking the wrong one or mixing conventions.
issues.fix: Move the PostgreSQL DDL block to a clearly marked 'Reference Only' appendix or a separate file in the 01-96 slot range.

issues.title: Missing SQLite Busy Timeout/WAL configuration
issues.why: While it references spec/05 for architecture, a standalone implementation of this module might suffer from 'database is locked' errors during concurrent CI/CD push resolutions if the specific SQLite pragmas aren't inlined.
issues.fix: Add a 'Recommended Pragmas' section to the Query Patterns including WAL mode and busy_timeout.

issues.title: Timestamp Unit Ambiguity in Postgres Block
issues.why: The SQLite DDL explicitly uses Unix seconds (INTEGER), but the Postgres reference block uses 'timestamptz'. A coder porting logic between them might introduce unit mismatches in application code.
issues.fix: Add a note to the Postgres block stating that for application logic parity, timestamps should be handled as UTC Unix seconds.
